title: S9: Runtime Host Adapter Completion (Executable Surfaces Only)
intent: Complete the remaining runtime-host adapter surfaces that are materially needed and architecturally ready. NetworkAdapter with P5 hostname allowlist enforcement and redirect-safe fetch. SecretsAdapter bridging gated execution to project-scoped SecretStore (read/use/injectEnv). CLI wiring of NodeExecAdapter replacing throw stub. No facades: if an adapter exists, it must really work.
acceptance_criteria: Completed and accepted prior to factory v0.1 migration
